q: 写个 SoC 看门狗驱动,实现 ops 并注册到 watchdog 框架怎么搭?

corruptions.why: 编造的喂狗函数;喂狗是 ops.ping

forbidden: 自己开 kernel 线程喂狗而不设 max_hw_heartbeat_ms
rubric: 填 watchdog_device(info/ops/min_timeout/max_timeout/max_hw_heartbeat_ms),实现 watchdog_ops(start/stop/ping/set_timeout);watchdog_init_timeout 取 DT/参数初值;devm_watchdog_register_device 注册
